title: Lane 1 systems independence runway
summary: After the remaining Steady Beta Foundation tail is closed, harden station/session structure, travel framing, and debug proof surfaces without blocking the other lanes.

execution_order.goal: Scope the next station/session boundary after the existing coordinator split and full-arc signoff are complete.
execution_order.why_now: Lane 1 should keep reducing `game.ts` pressure, but only after the foundation wave is actually closed.

execution_order.goal: Implement one behavior-preserving station/session helper or renderer-adjacent extraction.
execution_order.why_now: The station now carries more chapter identity and needs cleaner extension points.

execution_order.goal: Review the station/session extraction for behavior parity and clear ownership.
execution_order.why_now: Architecture cleanup should make later lanes safer without widening the feature surface.

execution_order.goal: Audit world-map, corridor, and station-return travel framing for the next beta chapter.
execution_order.why_now: Travel clarity can improve independently from content, geometry, and route authoring.

execution_order.goal: Implement the smallest travel-framing pass using existing map, station, and corridor seams.
execution_order.why_now: A calmer travel spine makes larger beta content feel authored instead of scattered.

execution_order.goal: Review travel framing for clarity, compact copy, and no navigation HUD drift.
execution_order.why_now: Travel guidance should remain in-world and low-chrome.

execution_order.goal: Scope a debug proof harness improvement for station, route, and map states.
execution_order.why_now: Parallel work needs better proof surfaces so integration does not become manual babysitting.

execution_order.goal: Implement one proof-harness improvement without changing gameplay.
execution_order.why_now: Better proof machinery lets future lane agents verify their own work without cross-lane gates.

execution_order.goal: Review the proof-harness change and decide whether lane 1 is ready for broader season-shell growth.
execution_order.why_now: The systems lane should finish this runway with more independence, not more coordination burden.

completion_gate: The existing Steady Beta Foundation tail is closed before this packet starts.
Lane 1 completes station/session, travel-framing, and proof-harness work without requiring lane 2, lane 3, or lane 4 changes.
Each implementation step has focused tests and build coverage.
No broad content pack, route catalog rewrite, traversal expansion, planner, inventory, economy, combat, or direct API mode is added.
guardrails: This lane starts only after `ECO-20260428-critic-456` is clean.
Keep lane 1 changes to systems, progression, station, map, and proof surfaces.
Do not absorb content-richness, vertical-spatial, or route-authoring work from other lanes.
Prefer one behavior-preserving extraction per implementation item.
Keep UI compact for the 256x160 handheld surface.
post_packet_path: If clean, lane 1 can open a later season-shell growth packet.
If blocked, write the smallest blocker item instead of creating another cross-lane gate.

scout_handoff.selected_boundary: Extract a pure field-station primary-action intent helper into `src/engine/field-station-session.ts` while keeping action side effects in `src/engine/game.ts`.
required_behavior: `SEASON -> ROUTES` Enter keeps ready-to-file route filing before support toggle before selected upgrade purchase.
`SEASON -> EXPEDITION` Enter keeps ready-to-file forest expedition filing before normal expedition card handling.
The helper returns an intent only; `game.ts` keeps route filing, support cycling, purchases, nursery actions, expedition activation, notices, audio, persistence, and debug behavior.
out_of_scope: Content, geometry, science-ledger, or travel-framing work
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t 'field station|outing support|season capstone|High Pass|Source to Shore'
npm test -- --run src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'station|High Pass|Source to Shore'

main_implementation.summary: Added `resolveFieldStationPrimaryAction()` as a pure station-session intent helper and kept all action side effects in `src/engine/game.ts`.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/runtime-smoke.test.ts -t 'field station|outing support|season capstone|High Pass|Source to Shore'
npm test -- --run src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t 'station|High Pass|Source to Shore'

scout_handoff_458.selected_boundary: Extract world-map travel label policy into a dedicated `src/engine/travel-framing.ts` helper while preserving existing labels and runtime behavior.
required_behavior: Forest map-return post keeps `HIGH PASS MAP` when the next field-season target is Treeline.
Forest world-map summary keeps `Last woods before High Pass.` in that same state.
World-map focus away from the current location keeps `FROM <CURRENT LOCATION>`.
Walking to Treeline keeps `HIGH PASS` as the approach label.

main_implementation_458.summary: Extracted world-map travel label policy into `src/engine/travel-framing.ts` with direct tests and preserved existing High Pass travel warmth behavior.

verification: git diff --check -- src/engine/travel-framing.ts src/engine/game.ts src/test/travel-framing.test.ts docs/architecture.md

scout_handoff_459.selected_boundary: Extract the local debug-snapshot boot/map/station/journal test helpers from `src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts` into a reusable test-only harness module.
required_behavior: Existing debug snapshot ids, titles, descriptions, save JSON, localStorage values, and paste commands remain unchanged.
Existing save-snapshot runtime assertions keep passing through the extracted helper.
The helper stays test-only and does not alter gameplay, route, station, map, content, geometry, save, or Source to Shore behavior.
out_of_scope: Debug snapshot content or id changes

main_implementation_459.summary: Extracted reusable debug-snapshot boot/map/station/journal helpers into `src/test/debug-snapshot-harness.ts` and updated save-snapshot tests to use them without changing runtime behavior or snapshot payloads.

critic_review_459.decision: Packet `176` is done; lane 1 has no remaining actionable item in this packet.
